title: valeriana capitata subsp. capitata
intro: Valeriana capitata subsp. capitata, also known as the Tall Valerian, is a perennial plant belonging to the valerian family (Valerianaceae). It is native to parts of North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and valepotriates. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Valeriana capitata subsp. capitata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsule or powder form, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
